title: MATANA 25 Premium Clear Hard Plastic Dinner Plates with Silver Glitter, 26cm / 10 Inch - Elegant & Reusable Party Plates for Weddings, Birthdays, Picnic, BBQ, Parties
features: Elegant & Sparkling Design: These 26 cm premium clear hard plastic plates with silver glitter add a touch of sophistication to any event, making them perfect for weddings, birthdays, and upscale gatherings.
Durable & Reusable: Crafted from high-quality PS plastic, these plastic dinner plates are built to withstand hearty servings and multiple uses, offering a reliable choice for any occasion.

Safe & Eco-Friendly: Made from BPA-free plastic, these reusable plates ensure a safe dining experience while helping you reduce environmental impact. They are a stylish and sustainable option for your events.
Easy Cleanup: Dishwasher safe for your convenience, these party plates are designed to simplify cleanup after events, so you can enjoy your celebration without the hassle of handwashing.

Versatile & Practical: Ideal for a variety of settings including parties, corporate events, catering, buffets, picnics, BBQs, and garden parties, these rigid plates are perfect for serving main courses and making any meal special.
description: Make every occasion memorable with our 25-pack premium clear hard plastic plates featuring a dazzling silver glitter design. Measuring 26 cm in diameter, these silver plastic plates are perfect for serving main courses at weddings, birthdays, corporate events, and more. Crafted from high-quality PS plastic, these rigid plates are not only durable and reusable but also BPA-free, ensuring a safe and eco-friendly dining experience. Their sturdy construction allows them to withstand hearty servings and multiple uses, making them a practical choice for any event. Designed with convenience in mind, these plastic dinner plates are dishwasher safe, simplifying cleanup and allowing you to enjoy your celebration without the hassle of handwashing. Their elegant and sparkling design adds a sophisticated touch to your table setting, whether you’re hosting a garden party, BBQ, picnic, or buffet. Versatile and practical, our silver glitter party plates are an excellent choice for a variety of settings. Enhance your event with these stylish and functional plates and make every meal special.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎BPA Free, Break Resistant, Heavy Duty, Lightweight, Reusable
